NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on this day between Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore, and Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, representing Aishah Innovations Pte Ltd (UEN: 201512345K), located at 45 Jurong East Street 21, Singapore, with contact number +65 6123 4567 and email siti.aishah@aishahinnovations.sg.

1. Confidential Information: Both parties agree that any information shared in relation to the Software Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") shall be considered confidential. This includes, but is not limited to, technical data, trade secrets, and any other proprietary information. However, updates on the project status shared with third parties are not covered under this Agreement.

2. Obligations: Both Dr. Tan and Siti Aishah agree not to disclose any confidential information to unauthorized persons. In the event of a breach, the disclosing party may seek legal remedies. All access to shared information must be regulated and documented. For the purposes of this Agreement, the identifier https://example.sg/user/S2345678B is used to manage online confidentiality.

This Agreement is a mutual understanding between the parties as of the date first above written.
